name: create_marketing_event
description: Create a new marketing event in HubSpot. Define the event name, type, start/end dates, and organizer details.

parameters.name: eventName
parameters.description: The name of the marketing event.

parameters.name: eventType
parameters.description: The type of event. E.g., WEBINAR, CONFERENCE, WORKSHOP.

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: ISO 8601 start date and time of the event.

parameters.name: endDateTime
parameters.description: ISO 8601 end date and time of the event.

parameters.name: eventOrganizer
parameters.description: Name of the person or team organizing the event.

parameters.name: eventDescription
parameters.description: A description of the event content and purpose.
parameters.example: Join us for a live demo of our new product features.

parameters.name: eventUrl
parameters.description: URL for the event landing page or registration.

parameters.name: externalEventId
parameters.description: Your external system's unique identifier for this event.

body.eventDescription: Join us for a live demo of our new product features.
